title: Pug's Cobblemon
description: Pug's Cobblemon combines the best mods for new biomes, structures, combat, and Pokémon! Explore diverse landscapes, decorate with unique furniture, and catch and train Pokémon with Cobblemon for an epic adventure.
body:
Welcome to Pug's Cobblemon, a carefully curated compilation of some of the best Cobblemon mods out there, designed to offer a whole new way to experience the game! This modpack is all about combining amazing biomes, structures, new gameplay mechanics, and exciting combat features to create a rich, immersive world full of adventures. Please note: I did not create any of these mods myself, I’ve simply compiled them so you can enjoy them together in one seamless experience!

Biomes & Structures:
With this modpack, you can explore a stunning variety of landscapes and structures, thanks to Terralith and Tectonic. These mods transform the world’s biomes into breathtaking terrains with new geological formations and vibrant ecosystems. The pack also includes Dungeons and Taverns Modline, adding exciting dungeons to discover, taverns to visit, and loads of loot to find. Structory offers even more custom structures to fill your world, while Better End and Better Nether upgrade the End and Nether with new villages and pillages, offering more opportunities for exploration and engagement. There’s always something new to uncover around every corner!

Combat:
Prepare for epic battles with Better Combat Mod, which overhauls the combat system, adding new mechanics for a more immersive and strategic fighting experience. With combat reworked, you’ll also need to check out new weapons, armor, and powerful mobs from the new structures and dungeons.

Decoration & QOL Mods:
Decorating your world has never been so fun! With mods like Handcrafted, Clutter, Supplementaries, and Amendments, you can fill your homes with realistic, cozy furniture, tiny details, and all sorts of cute and functional decorations. Looking for something a bit more Pokémon-related? Pokeblocks and Plushables add delightful plush toys and blocks related to the Pokémon universe. Additionally, Paladins Furniture adds even more styles to your interiors.

To make life easier in Minecraft, this pack also includes Quality of Life mods like Decaying Leaves, 3D Skin Layers, and Better Animations. These tweaks improve the overall game experience, from visual polish to small gameplay improvements that enhance immersion.

Pokémon:
For all the Pokémon fans out there, get ready for an unforgettable adventure! Cobblemon adds a massive roster of Megas, Legendaries, and more Pokémon to catch, train, and battle. You can now ride your Pokémon, hatch eggs, collect badges, explore Pokémon-themed structures, and engage in battles with TMs and HMs. And with the addition of Pokémon-related décor, your world will truly feel like a Pokémon Trainer’s dream!
